title: SoFi Technologies Q4 2024 Earnings Beat
text: SoFi Technologies delivered stronger-than-expected fourth quarter results, with the fintech company reporting earnings per share of $0.05 against analyst expectations of $0.04—representing a 25% surprise to the upside. The company generated quarterly revenues of $739.11 million, exceeding consensus estimates by 8.80%. This compares favorably to year-ago revenues of $594.25 million, reflecting robust year-over-year growth. SoFi has demonstrated consistent execution, surpassing consensus earnings estimates in all four of the last four quarters. The company has also topped revenue expectations four times over the same period. Shares have advanced approximately 16.4% since January began, outpacing the broader S&P 500's 3.7% gain. The company maintains a Zacks Rank #1 Strong Buy rating, as estimate revisions remain favorable heading into future quarters. Analysts anticipate SoFi will generate $0.06 EPS for the coming quarter on roughly $688.89 million in revenues, with full-year estimates of $0.30 per share on $2.97 billion in total revenues.
